gates.name: shellcheck
gates.command: command -v shellcheck >/dev/null && shellcheck scripts/*.sh 2>&1 | head -20 || echo 'shellcheck not installed, skipping'
gates.failMessage: shellcheck found issues in shell scripts.

gates.name: no-staged-secrets
gates.failMessage: Possible secrets staged for commit — review before proceeding.

gates.name: json-valid
gates.command: find . -name '*.json' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' | xargs -I{} python3 -c "import json,sys; json.load(open('{}'))" 2>&1 | head -10
gates.failMessage: Invalid JSON found — fix before committing.

gates.name: ts-no-fixme
gates.command: git diff --cached --name-only | grep '\.ts$' | xargs grep -n 'FIXME\|TODO.*HACK' 2>/dev/null | head -10 || true
gates.failMessage: FIXME/TODO-HACK markers in staged TypeScript files.
